title: ⚡ Silky Smooth Navigation & Story Mode Fixes! 📖
message: We have optimized performance across the entire app to deliver a snappier interface while completely correcting our real-time karaoke text highlighting bugs!
points: ⚡ Ultra-Smooth Transitions: Fine-tuned layouts, filters, and page flows to make browsing and navigating resources extremely fluid.
📖 Story Mode Highlights Restored: Corrected native audio string matching bounds so karaoke highlights follow text-to-speech tracking in perfect sync.
🛡️ Graceful Failure Protocols: Fixed offline routing exceptions to ensure missing ad network caches never drop or block your active lesson entries.

title: 🎙️ All-New Hands-Free Audio Podcast Mode! 🎧
message: We have unlocked a premium audio learning experience so you can master your favorite courses on the go, completely hands-free!
points: 🎧 Continuous Audio Podcasts: Switch any course into audio stream mode to listen to full theory chapters without pausing or manually answering quiz questions.
🎵 Real-Time Karaoke Highlights: Experience perfect Spotify-style lyrics syncing that highlights words exactly as the text-to-speech engine speaks them aloud.
📱 Smart Playback Engine: Enjoy persistent session recovery that remembers where you left off, side-by-side with an auto-expanding live accordion track explorer.

title: ⚡ Instant Launch & Navigation Patch! 🚀
message: We have pushed a snappy optimization upgrade to give you finer control over your loading sequence and iron out onboarding navigation flows.
points: 🎬 Splash Toggle Switch: You can now toggle the Splash Intro Video on or off directly inside your Profile settings for a lightning-fast, zero-delay application cold boot.
🗺️ Navigation Bar Fix: Corrected a critical onboarding glitch that caused the floating bottom navigation layout dock to stay hidden for brand-new downloading users.

title: 🧠 SkillSprint AI Engine Unlocked! 🚀
message: We have forged a revolutionary update that puts local Artificial Intelligence directly into your hands to create completely customized learning paths.
points: 🤖 Local SkillSprint AI: Choose your topic and difficulty to forge completely dynamic course blueprints right on your device.
🎮 Automated Gameplay: Your custom blueprints instantly transform into playable masterclass theory cards and gamified quizzes.
⚙️ AI RAM Optimizer: Memory structures auto-offload immediately following stream generations to keep lightweight phone specs running flawlessly.
💎 Generation Locks: Free tier updates support 1 active forged module blueprint at a time; upgrade to Premium for unlimited generation capability.

title: ✨ The Update Hub is Here! 🚀
message: We've crafted a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest courses and features.
points: 🔔 In-App Updater: Get instantly notified about fresh content directly from your dashboard.
📖 Interactive Changelogs: Discover exactly what's new the moment we drop an update.
🔄 Manual Check: Instantly check for new features anytime with the new cloud sync button.
⚡ Faster Launches: We removed startup interruptions so you get to your courses faster.
